mapper.sql: id, bill_month, cust_name, code, receive_count, avg_weight, receivable_amount, special_remark, adjust_amount, transfer_type, actual_amount, transfer_date, remark, verify_sign, type, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT w.send_customer_name AS custName, w.send_customer AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, '直营客户' AS custType FROM t_waybill_detail w WHERE (w.emp_type IS NULL OR w.emp_type = '') AND w.send_customer_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY w.send_customer_name, w.send_customer

SELECT c.contract_name AS custName, '' AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, '直营业务员' AS custType FROM t_contract_staff c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.real_name = w.salesman_name WHERE w.emp_type IS NOT NULL AND w.emp_type != '' AND c.staff_type = 1 GROUP BY c.contract_name

SELECT c.contract_name AS custName, '' AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, w.emp_type AS custType FROM t_contract_staff c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.real_name = w.salesman_name WHERE w.emp_type = '散件' AND c.staff_type = 0 GROUP BY c.contract_name,w.emp_type

SELECT c.emp_name AS custName, '' AS code, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(w.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(w.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, w.emp_type AS custType FROM t_shop_emp c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.shop_name = w.settle_name WHERE w.emp_type IN ('淘宝', '限定') AND c.platform = w.material_type GROUP BY c.emp_name, w.emp_type

SELECT t1.emp_name AS empName, t1.cust_name AS custName, COUNT(*) AS receiveCount, AVG(t2.weight) AS avgWeight, SUM(t2.express_fee) AS receivableAmount, '特批' AS custType FROM t_shop_emp t1 INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail t2 ON t1.shop_name = t2.settle_name WHERE t2.emp_type = '特批' GROUP BY t1.emp_name,t1.cust_name
SELECT w.* FROM t_waybill_detail w WHERE (w.emp_type IS NULL OR w.emp_type = '') AND w.send_customer_name IS NOT NULL AND w.bill_month = #{billMonth} AND w.send_customer_name = #{customerName}

SELECT w.* FROM t_contract_staff c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.real_name = w.salesman_name WHERE w.emp_type IS NOT NULL AND w.emp_type != '' AND c.staff_type = 1 AND w.bill_month = #{billMonth} AND w.salesman_name = #{customerName}

SELECT w.waybill_no, w.scan_time, w.weight, w.province, w.destination, w.salesman_name, w.send_customer, w.send_customer_name, w.settle_code, w.settle_name, w.material_type, w.extra_fee, w.express_fee, w.bill_month FROM t_contract_staff c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.real_name = w.salesman_name WHERE w.emp_type = '散件' AND c.staff_type = 0 AND w.bill_month = #{billMonth} AND c.contract_name = #{contractName}

SELECT w.waybill_no, w.scan_time, w.weight, w.province, w.destination, w.salesman_name, w.send_customer, w.send_customer_name, w.settle_code, w.settle_name, w.material_type, w.extra_fee, w.express_fee, w.bill_month FROM t_shop_emp c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.shop_name = w.settle_name WHERE w.emp_type = '淘宝' AND c.platform = w.material_type AND w.bill_month = #{billMonth} AND c.emp_name = #{empName}

SELECT w.waybill_no, w.scan_time, w.weight, w.province, w.destination, w.salesman_name, w.send_customer, w.send_customer_name, w.settle_code, w.settle_name, w.material_type, w.extra_fee, w.express_fee, w.bill_month FROM t_shop_emp c INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail w ON c.shop_name = w.settle_name WHERE w.emp_type = '限定' AND c.platform = w.material_type AND w.bill_month = #{billMonth} AND c.emp_name = #{empName}
SELECT cust_name, emp_name FROM t_shop_emp WHERE emp_type = '特批' GROUP BY cust_name, emp_name

SELECT t2.waybill_no, t2.scan_time, t2.weight, t2.province, t2.destination, t2.salesman_name, t2.send_customer, t2.send_customer_name, t2.settle_code, t2.settle_name, t2.material_type, t2.extra_fee, t2.express_fee, t2.bill_month FROM t_shop_emp t1 INNER JOIN t_waybill_detail t2 ON t1.shop_name = t2.settle_name WHERE t2.emp_type = '特批' AND t1.cust_name = #{custName} AND t2.bill_month = #{billMonth}
